title: Thor Lien
compiled_truth: Thor Lien is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-12-07 to 2001-11-29), Thor Lien sent 4 and received 246 emails, totalling 250 interactions. Top correspondents: [Mike McConnell](people/mike-mcconnell) (3), [Jeffrey Shankman](people/jeffrey-shankman) (3), [Vince Kaminski](people/vince-kaminski) (1), [Brent Price](people/brent-price) (1).
